ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "fixture_difficulty" INTEGER /* Fixture difficulty */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "home_stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Home stadium capacity */,
  "average_attendance" INTEGER /* Average attendance of the team */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Wins by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Draws by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Losses by the team */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Goals conceded by the team */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Clean sheets by the team */,
  "penalties_saved" INTEGER /* Penalties saved by the team */,
  "own_goals" INTEGER /* Own goals by the team */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Penalties missed by the team */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Yellow cards received by the team */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Red cards received by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fixtures" (
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fixture */,
  "team_a_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "team_h_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "kickoff_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the fixture */,
  "kickoff_time_formatted" TEXT /* Formatted date and time of the fixture */,
  "event" INTEGER /* Event */,
  "finished" INTEGER /* Finished */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Minutes */,
  "provisional_start_time" INTEGER /* Provisional start time */,
  "finished_provisional" INTEGER /* Finished provisional */,
  "pending_kickoff_time" INTEGER /* Pending kickoff time */,
  "team_a_score" INTEGER /* Away team score */,
  "team_h_score" INTEGER /* Home team score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fixture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fixture */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "attempted_passes" INTEGER /* Number of attempted passes */,
  "big_chances_created" INTEGER /* Number of big chances created */,
  "big_chances_missed" INTEGER /* Number of big chances missed */,
  "bonus" INTEGER /* Bonus points */,
  "bps" INTEGER /* BPS (Bonus Points System) */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets */,
  "clearances_blocks_interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of clearances, blocks, and interceptions */,
  "completed_passes" INTEGER /* Number of completed passes */,
  "creativity" REAL /* Creativity */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of dribbles */,
  "ea_index" INTEGER /* EA Index */,
  "errors_leading_to_goal" INTEGER /* Number of errors leading to goal */,
  "errors_leading_to_goal_attempt" INTEGER /* Number of errors leading to goal attempt */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "ict_index" INTEGER /* ICT Index */,
  "influence" REAL /* Influence */,
  "key_passes" REAL /* Number of key passes */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played */,
  "offside" INTEGER /* Number of times offside */,
  "open_play_crosses" INTEGER /* Number of open play crosses */,
  "opponent_team" INTEGER /* Opponent team */,
  "own_goals" INTEGER /* Number of own goals */,
  "penalties_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of penalties conceded */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties missed */,
  "penalties_saved" INTEGER /* Number of penalties saved */,
  "recoveries" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards */,
  "selected" INTEGER /* Was the player selected? */,
  "tackled" INTEGER /* Number of tackles */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of times tackled */,
  "target_missed" REAL /* Number of target misses */,
  "threat" INTEGER /* Threat */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points */,
  "transfers_balance" INTEGER /* Transfers balance */,
  "transfers_in" INTEGER /* Number of transfers in */,
  "transfers_out" INTEGER /* Number of transfers out */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value */,
  "was_home" INTEGER /* Was the player at home? */,
  "winning_goals" INTEGER /* Number of winning goals */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards */,
  "expected_assists" REAL /* Expected assists */,
  "expected_goals" REAL /* Expected goals */,
  "expected_goal_involvements" REAL /* Expected goal involvements */,
  "expected_threat" REAL /* Expected threat */,
  "goals_involvements" REAL /* Goals involvements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_fixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("fixture_id") REFERENCES fixtures ("fixture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fixture */,
  "points" REAL /* Points scored */,
  "minutes_per_point" REAL /* Minutes per point */,
  "form" REAL /* Form */,
  "ict_index_rank" INTEGER /* ICT Index rank */,
  "influence_rank" INTEGER /* Influence rank */,
  "creativity_rank" INTEGER /* Creativity rank */,
  "threat_rank" INTEGER /* Threat rank */,
  "ict_index_rank_team" INTEGER /* ICT Index rank for the team */,
  "influence_rank_team" INTEGER /* Influence rank for the team */,
  "creativity_rank_team" INTEGER /* Creativity rank for the team */,
  "threat_rank_team" INTEGER /* Threat rank for the team */,
  "expected_assists" REAL /* Expected assists */,
  "expected_goals" REAL /* Expected goals */,
  "expected_goal_involvements" REAL /* Expected goal involvements */,
  "expected_threat" REAL /* Expected threat */,
  "goals_involvements" REAL /* Goals involvements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fixture */,
  "points" REAL /* Points scored */,
  "minutes_per_point" REAL /* Minutes per point */,
  "form" REAL /* Form */,
  "ict_index_rank" INTEGER /* ICT Index rank */,
  "influence_rank" INTEGER /* Influence rank */,
  "creativity_rank" INTEGER /* Creativity rank */,
  "threat_rank" INTEGER /* Threat rank */,
  "ict_index_rank_league" INTEGER /* ICT Index rank for the league */,
  "influence_rank_league" INTEGER /* Influence rank for the league */,
  "creativity_rank_league" INTEGER /* Creativity rank for the league */,
  "threat_rank_league" INTEGER /* Threat rank for the league */,
  "expected_assists" REAL /* Expected assists */,
  "expected_goals" REAL /* Expected goals */,
  "expected_goal_involvements" REAL /* Expected goal involvements */,
  "expected_threat" REAL /* Expected threat */,
  "goals_involvements" REAL /* Goals involvements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_type" TEXT /* Type of the team (e.g., real team, fantasy team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_players_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_name" TEXT /* Name of the injury */,
  "injury_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the injury */,
  "injury_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "news_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
